name: wicked-prezzie
description: HTML slides to native editable PowerPoint — plan, generate, convert, validate, and refine. 13 skills covering the full presentation lifecycle from blank page to polished deck.

plugins.name: wicked-prezzie
plugins.description: HTML slides to native editable PowerPoint — plan, generate, convert, validate, and refine. Extracts real shapes and formatted text via Chrome headless, builds PPTX with python-pptx, validates structure, then iterates per-slide with visual comparison. Supports model-driven fixes via EDL specs and python-pptx recipes.
